message:
feat: streaming execution engine for TB+ scale queries

Pull-based operator pipeline replaces full materialization:
- ScanOperator, FilterOperator, ProjectOperator, LimitOperator
- AggregateOperator (streaming partial agg, O(groups) memory)
- TopKOperator (ORDER BY + LIMIT via min-heap, O(K) memory)
- ExternalSortOperator (spill to NDJSON temp files, K-way merge)
- HashJoinOperator (.join() API, build/probe with hash map)
- WasmAggregateOperator (SIMD sum/min/max/avg on raw buffers)
- Lance v2 page stats (compute-and-cache min/max for page skipping)
